summary: New Ops Deck tool: terrain-adjusted MPG calculator with 8 terrain types, elevation penalties, speed curves, climate adjustments, fuel timeline, and jerry can cache recommendations
Replaced 35 Unsplash placeholder images with real product photos; swapped Aquamira tablets to drops
Added 6 DFG Offroad fridge slides — model-specific mounts for Dometic CFX 95DZ, CFX3 35-45, CFX3 55IM, CFX5 25, ARB Zero 47, and ARB 63-82Qt
Fixed PDF export — text no longer overlaps vertically or overflows horizontally in summary boxes
Added 'How This Tool Works' explainer card to all 12 tool pages — straight-talk descriptions of what each tool does and why it matters
New Ops Deck tool — design a complete 12V aux electrical system with wire gauge calculator, fuse sizing, LiFePO4 battery bank design, DC-DC charger selection, and safety-verified wiring diagram
Trail System layer — NPS park closure alerts, BLM route status (open/closed/limited), USFS seasonal access by vehicle type for 7 trail systems including Moab, Bighorn, Paiute, Glamis, and more
Added 9 everyday vehicles: GMC Canyon, Colorado Z71, Sierra SLE, Silverado LT, Forester Wilderness, Outback Premium, Bronco Sport, RAV4 TRD, Passport TrailSport — 41 vehicles total
Launched with 32 vehicles, 10 mod categories, real-time MPG/payload/stability physics engine
Added data privacy notices, ZIP code auto-fill system, and version tracking across all calculators
Launched choice-based survival scenarios — your decisions determine if you make it out

Expanded to 80 items across 11 categories with real ASINs and affiliate links
